# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

# Elasticsearch Snapshot Configuration for Automated Backups

# S3 Repository Configuration
s3_repository_config:
  repository_name: "backup_repository_s3"
  type: "s3"
  settings:
    bucket: "elasticsearch-snapshots"
    region: "us-east-1"
    base_path: "elasticsearch/snapshots"
    compress: true
    server_side_encryption: true
    storage_class: "standard_ia"
    max_retries: 3
    use_throttle_retries: true
    chunk_size: "100mb"
    canned_acl: "private"
    readonly: false

# File Share Repository Configuration
file_share_repository_config:
  repository_name: "backup_repository_filestore"
  type: "fs"
  settings:
    location: "/mnt/elasticsearch/backups"
    compress: true
    chunk_size: "100mb"
    max_restore_bytes_per_sec: "40mb"
    max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: "40mb"
    readonly: false

# Azure Repository Configuration
azure_repository_config:
  repository_name: "backup_repository_azure"
  type: "azure"
  settings:
    container: "elasticsearch-snapshots"
    base_path: "snapshots"
    compress: true
    chunk_size: "100mb"
    readonly: false

# GCS Repository Configuration
gcs_repository_config:
  repository_name: "backup_repository_gcs"
  type: "gcs"
  settings:
    bucket: "elasticsearch-snapshots"
    base_path: "snapshots"
    compress: true
    chunk_size: "100mb"
    readonly: false

# Snapshot Lifecycle Management (SLM) Policies
slm_policies:
  daily_snapshots:
    name: "daily-snapshots"
    schedule: "0 30 1 * * ?"
    repository: "backup_repository_s3"
    config:
      indices: ["*"]
      ignore_unavailable: false
      include_global_state: true
      partial: false
      metadata:
        taken_by: "automated-backup"
        taken_because: "daily scheduled backup"
    retention:
      expire_after: "30d"
      min_count: 5
      max_count: 50

  weekly_snapshots:
    name: "weekly-snapshots"
    schedule: "0 0 2 ? * SUN"
    repository: "backup_repository_s3"
    config:
      indices: ["*"]
      ignore_unavailable: false
      include_global_state: true
      partial: false
      metadata:
        taken_by: "automated-backup"
        taken_because: "weekly scheduled backup"
    retention:
      expire_after: "90d"
      min_count: 4
      max_count: 13

  monthly_snapshots:
    name: "monthly-snapshots"
    schedule: "0 0 3 1 * ?"
    repository: "backup_repository_s3"
    config:
      indices: ["*"]
      ignore_unavailable: false
      include_global_state: true
      partial: false
      metadata:
        taken_by: "automated-backup"
        taken_because: "monthly scheduled backup"
    retention:
      expire_after: "365d"
      min_count: 12
      max_count: 24

  critical_indices_hourly:
    name: "critical-indices-hourly"
    schedule: "0 0 * * * ?"
    repository: "backup_repository_s3"
    config:
      indices: ["logs-*", "metrics-*", "critical-data-*"]
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: false
      partial: false
      metadata:
        taken_by: "automated-backup"
        taken_because: "hourly critical data backup"
    retention:
      expire_after: "7d"
      min_count: 24
      max_count: 168

# Manual Snapshot Configurations
manual_snapshot_configs:
  full_cluster_snapshot:
    name_pattern: "snapshot-full-{now/d}"
    repository: "backup_repository_s3"
    indices: ["*"]
    ignore_unavailable: false
    include_global_state: true
    partial: false
    wait_for_completion: false
    metadata:
      snapshot_type: "full"
      created_by: "operations-team"

  specific_indices_snapshot:
    name_pattern: "snapshot-indices-{now/d}"
    repository: "backup_repository_s3"
    indices: ["index1", "index2", "index3"]
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: false
    partial: false
    wait_for_completion: false
    metadata:
      snapshot_type: "partial"
      created_by: "operations-team"

  incremental_snapshot:
    name_pattern: "snapshot-incremental-{now/d}"
    repository: "backup_repository_s3"
    indices: ["logs-*"]
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: false
    partial: true
    wait_for_completion: false
    metadata:
      snapshot_type: "incremental"
      created_by: "operations-team"

# Restore Configurations
restore_configs:
  full_cluster_restore:
    snapshot_name: "snapshot-full-2024-01-01"
    repository: "backup_repository_s3"
    indices: ["*"]
    ignore_unavailable: false
    include_global_state: true
    partial: false
    include_aliases: true
    wait_for_completion: false
    index_settings:
      index.number_of_replicas: 1

  selective_indices_restore:
    snapshot_name: "snapshot-indices-2024-01-01"
    repository: "backup_repository_s3"
    indices: ["index1", "index2"]
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: false
    partial: false
    include_aliases: true
    rename_pattern: "(.+)"
    rename_replacement: "restored_$1"
    wait_for_completion: false
    index_settings:
      index.number_of_replicas: 0
      index.refresh_interval: -1

  point_in_time_restore:
    snapshot_name: "snapshot-full-2024-01-01"
    repository: "backup_repository_s3"
    indices: ["critical-data-*"]
    ignore_unavailable: false
    include_global_state: false
    partial: false
    include_aliases: false
    rename_pattern: "critical-data-(.*)"
    rename_replacement: "restored-critical-data-$1"
    wait_for_completion: true

# Repository Verification Settings
repository_verification:
  enabled: true
  verify_on_creation: true
  periodic_verification:
    enabled: true
    schedule: "0 0 4 * * ?"

# Snapshot Monitoring Configuration
monitoring:
  enabled: true
  check_interval: "5m"
  alert_on_failure: true
  alert_channels:
    - type: "email"
      recipients: ["ops-team@company.com"]
    - type: "slack"
      webhook_url: "https://hooks.slack.com/services/XXX/YYY/ZZZ"
      channel: "#elasticsearch-alerts"
    - type: "pagerduty"
      service_key: "your-pagerduty-service-key"

  metrics:
    - snapshot_count
    - snapshot_size
    - snapshot_duration
    - restore_duration
    - failed_snapshots
    - successful_snapshots

# Security Settings
security:
  s3:
    access_key_id: "${AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID}"
    secret_access_key: "${AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY}"
    session_token: "${AWS_SESSION_TOKEN}"
    iam_role: "arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/elasticsearch-snapshot-role"

  azure:
    account: "elasticsearchstorage"
    key: "${AZURE_STORAGE_KEY}"
    sas_token: "${AZURE_SAS_TOKEN}"

  gcs:
    service_account: "${GCS_SERVICE_ACCOUNT}"
    credentials_file: "/path/to/service-account-key.json"

# Elasticsearch Configuration Updates
elasticsearch_yaml_config:
  path.repo: 
    - "/mnt/elasticsearch/backups"
    - "/mnt/shared/elasticsearch/snapshots"
  
  repositories.s3.bucket: "elasticsearch-snapshots"
  repositories.s3.region: "us-east-1"
  repositories.azure.container: "elasticsearch-snapshots"
  repositories.gcs.bucket: "elasticsearch-snapshots"

# API Commands Reference
api_commands:
  create_s3_repository: |
    PUT /_snapshot/backup_repository_s3
    {
      "type": "s3",
      "settings": {
        "bucket": "elasticsearch-snapshots",
        "region": "us-east-1",
        "base_path": "elasticsearch/snapshots",
        "compress": true,
        "server_side_encryption": true
      }
    }

  create_fs_repository: |
    PUT /_snapshot/backup_repository_filestore
    {
      "type": "fs",
      "settings": {
        "location": "/mnt/elasticsearch/backups",
        "compress": true
      }
    }

  verify_repository: |
    POST /_snapshot/backup_repository_s3/_verify

  create_snapshot: |
    PUT /_snapshot/backup_repository_s3/snapshot-{now/d}
    {
      "indices": "*",
      "ignore_unavailable": true,
      "include_global_state": true,
      "metadata": {
        "taken_by": "operations-team",
        "taken_because": "manual backup"
      }
    }

  create_slm_policy: |
    PUT /_slm/policy/daily-snapshots
    {
      "schedule": "0 30 1 * * ?",
      "name": "<daily-snap-{now/d}>",
      "repository": "backup_repository_s3",
      "config": {
        "indices": ["*"],
        "include_global_state": true
      },
      "retention": {
        "expire_after": "30d",
        "min_count": 5,
        "max_count": 50
      }
    }

  get_snapshot_status: |
    GET /_snapshot/backup_repository_s3/_all

  restore_snapshot: |
    POST /_snapshot/backup_repository_s3/snapshot-2024-01-01/_restore
    {
      "indices": "*",
      "ignore_unavailable": true,
      "include_global_state": true,
      "include_aliases": true
    }

  delete_snapshot: |
    DELETE /_snapshot/backup_repository_s3/snapshot-2024-01-01

  get_slm_status: |
    GET /_slm/status

  execute_slm_policy: |
    POST /_slm/policy/daily-snapshots/_execute

# Backup Retention Policy
retention_policies:
  default_policy:
    daily_retention_days: 30
    weekly_retention_days: 90
    monthly_retention_days: 365
    yearly_retention_days: 2555
    min_snapshots_to_keep: 5

  critical_data_policy:
    hourly_retention_hours: 168
    daily_retention_days: 60
    weekly_retention_days: 180
    monthly_retention_days: 730
    min_snapshots_to_keep: 24

# Disaster Recovery Configuration
disaster_recovery:
  primary_repository: "backup_repository_s3"
  secondary_repository: "backup_repository_azure"
  replication:
    enabled: true
    sync_interval: "6h"
  
  recovery_time_objective: "4h"
  recovery_point_objective: "1h"
  
  failover_procedure:
    - verify_secondary_repository
    - list_available_snapshots
    - restore_latest_snapshot
    - verify_cluster_health
    - update_application_endpoints

# Operational Procedures
operational_procedures:
  pre_snapshot_checks:
    - verify_cluster_health
    - check_disk_space
    - verify_repository_access
    - check_snapshot_in_progress

  post_snapshot_checks:
    - verify_snapshot_success
    - check_snapshot_size
    - update_backup_log
    - send_notification

  pre_restore_checks:
    - verify_snapshot_exists
    - check_cluster_capacity
    - backup_current_state
    - stop_indexing_operations

  post_restore_checks:
    - verify_data_integrity
    - check_index_count
    - verify_document_count
    - resume_indexing_operations
    - update_restore_log

# Troubleshooting Guide
troubleshooting:
  common_issues:
    repository_verification_failed:
      - check_network_connectivity
      - verify_credentials
      - check_storage_permissions
      - verify_path_repo_setting

    snapshot_creation_failed:
      - check_cluster_health
      - verify_disk_space
      - check_repository_capacity
      - review_elasticsearch_logs

    restore_operation_failed:
      - verify_snapshot_integrity
      - check_cluster_capacity
      - verify_index_conflicts
      - check_shard_allocation

    slow_snapshot_performance:
      - increase_max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec
      - check_network_bandwidth
      - verify_storage_performance
      - review_chunk_size_setting
